# Asaptic Labs — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org
# Updated: 2026-05-22

## About

Asaptic Labs builds Agentic AI at four crossings — Quantum Computing, Physical AI, Autonomous Enterprise, and Care AI. We work at the frontiers where AI agents move from answering questions to taking irreversible actions, and where the hard problems of trust, accountability, and regulated-environment access remain unsolved.

## Brand domains

- × Quantum Computing → PQSafe (https://www.pqsafe.xyz)
- × Physical AI → kinaite (https://kinaite.com)
- × Autonomous Enterprise → CompanyForge (https://companyforge.ai)
- × Care AI → CareEZ (https://careez.org)

## Thesis

AI agents are moving from answering questions to taking actions — signing mandates, routing care decisions, controlling physical systems, running entire enterprises. At each of these action surfaces, a wrong decision is not a redo. Four crossings define where the hard work is:

× Quantum Computing. Agents sign, authenticate, and delegate. Every signature today uses cryptography that quantum computing will render breakable on a known timetable. The trust layer — identity envelopes, delegation chains, audit logs — must survive that transition. Our open-source post-quantum project builds the trust layer agents need to sign and authenticate in the next decade.

× Physical AI. AI agents embodied in the eldercare physical-AI stack — humanoid companion care (L1), rehab robot (L2), clinical food (L3), clinical data flywheel (L4). kinaite is the brand where agents meet atoms in the care physical domain.

× Autonomous Enterprise. AI agents that run the whole company end-to-end — not copilots, not assistants, the workforce itself. CompanyForge is the engine (audit-band reasoning, memory system, compliance graph) that takes a regulated vertical and turns it into a one-operator AI business. First implementation: an eldercare franchise network. Next vertical: PierForge cross-border supply chain.

× Care AI. AI in regulated human care — multilingual swallowing-safety screening for frontline carers in residential care homes. CareEZ is where agents meet regulated human care, operating inside the room where the dataset that matters is built.

## Public essays

- Why the moat in AI is the override log — https://asaptic.com/blog/override-log-as-moat.html
- What the quantum transition means for agent identity — https://asaptic.com/blog/quantum-agent-identity.html
- Why physical-world care is the hardest crossing — https://asaptic.com/blog/physical-care-hardest-crossing.html

## Engage

Asaptic Labs is selectively open to partners, mentors, advisors, talented builders, and those who can open access to regulated environments, institutional compute, standards bodies, or networks that take years to enter through conventional channels. We are not currently raising capital.

Contact: engage@asaptic.com
Engage page: https://asaptic.com/engage.html

## Brand

Name: Asaptic Labs
Domain: https://asaptic.com
Scope: Agentic AI at four crossings — Quantum Computing, Physical AI, Autonomous Enterprise, Care AI
Region: Asia-based, global scope
Byline: Asaptic Labs (no individual attributed)
